title: Dunes&Drought
description:
Mod has been merged! - https://modrinth.com/mod/jaizmod
This is to keep the work load down for myself, and keep updates coming!

This mod overhauls alot of the desert with several new exploration based features!
body:
Mod has been merged! - https://modrinth.com/mod/jaizmod
This is to keep the work load down for myself, and keep updates coming!

This mod overhauls the exploration and structures of the desert. It adds several new areas to explore such as fossil pits, oasis', tradings posts and desert ruins. 10 new tools, three new goat horns, a new music disk and a new trading item are also featured. this will make the desert more interesting and survivable.
